query:
Here is an establishment or group in the CHR sector (Cafés, Hotels, or Restaurants): LES TOQUÉES DE LA CUISINE BY MARIE LAURENT and its website https://www.lestoqueesdelacuisine.com.
Optionnaly here is the address 110 QUAI GÉRY LEGRAND, Lille 59000, FR and country code FR

I need to understand its current affiliation and group size.

1.  Determine whether this establishment is independent or part of a larger group
2.  If it is part of a group, determine the total number of locations owned by this group.

CRITICAL DEFINITIONS & CONSTRAINTS:

- Establishment Scope: Consider all food service businesses (restaurants, cafes, hotels, bakery, bars) the CHR sector.
- Input Flexibility: The name and domain provided may refer to a single location or the larger parent group. 
In all cases, these are the starting points for your search.
- Total Locations Calculation (Group definition): The term owns must be interpreted in the broadest sense. The total number of locations must be the sum of all sites directly owned/operate PLUS all sites operated via franchise agreements (Total = Owned + Franchised).
- Use the group's webpage centralizing all their locations, often called "our locations," "nos restaurants," or "store locator." to check the number of locations they display there.
- Final Result Selection: The final number of locations reported must be the highest total number found across all sources (webpage, store locator, reports, etc.). If only one location is found, the result is 1.
answer:
## Executive Summary
Les Toquées de la Cuisine is an independent, single-location establishment operating as a cooking school, restaurant, and guest house in Lille, France. The business operates through intertwined legal entities, primarily SARL LES TOQUEES DE LA CUISINE and TITOY RESTAURATION. As of February 23, 2026, the restaurant operating entity (TITOY RESTAURATION) was placed into judicial liquidation. The total number of locations owned or operated by this group is **1**.

## Corporate Structure and Affiliation
The establishment operates through a complex, intertwined corporate structure at a single physical address, transitioning from a family-owned model to external management before facing insolvency.

*   **The Cooking School Entity:** Founded in 2006 by Marie Laurent, the cooking school is registered as SARL LES TOQUEES DE LA CUISINE (SIREN 478 691 843) [ACCUEIL | LES TOQUÉES DE LA CUISINE](https://www.lestoqueesdelacuisine.com). The company was transformed into a SASU on June 30, 2020, with Marie-Christine Laurent serving as President [Pappers](https://www.pappers.fr/entreprise/sarl-les-toquees-de-la-cuisine-478691843). 
*   **The Restaurant Entity:** On February 3, 2023, LES TOQUEES DE LA CUISINE transferred its catering and guest room business assets, valued at 406,000 Euros, to TITOY RESTAURATION (SIREN 841 507 221) [Societe.com](https://www.societe.com/societe/sarl-les-toquees-de-la-cuisine-478691843.html), [PagesJaunes](https://www.pagesjaunes.fr/pros/50345445). Following this transfer, SARL LES TOQUEES DE LA CUISINE became a shareholder of TITOY RESTAURATION [Pappers](https://www.pappers.fr/entreprise/titoy-restauration-841507221).
*   **Leadership Instability and Liquidation:** TITOY RESTAURATION has undergone rapid leadership changes recently. Benoit Bernard served as President until October 28, 2024 [Societe.com](https://www.societe.com/societe/titoy-restauration-841507221.html). SARL LES TOQUEES DE LA CUISINE was briefly appointed President on January 14, 2025 [ActuLegales](https://actulegales.fr/recherche/siren/841507221), before JKUBBE HOLDING took over the presidency on May 9, 2025 [Le Figaro](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/titoy-restauration-59/entreprise-841507221). Ultimately, TITOY RESTAURATION was placed into judicial liquidation by the Lille-Metropole Commercial Court on February 23, 2026 [Le Figaro](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/titoy-restauration-59/entreprise-841507221).

## Operations and Management
The site functions as a multi-service venue located at 108 bis and 110 Quai Géry Legrand, Lille [A PROPOS | LES TOQUÉES DE LA CUISINE](https://lestoqueesdelacuisine.com/a-propos/). 

*   **Shared Facilities:** The cooking school, "Les Toquées de la Cuisine," shares an entrance with the restaurant "Les Toquées" [A PROPOS | LES TOQUÉES DE LA CUISINE](https://lestoqueesdelacuisine.com/a-propos/). 
*   **Service Scope:** The broader establishment includes a bistronomic restaurant for lunch, a gastronomic restaurant for dinner, a fine grocery store named "Épicerie By Benoit Bernard," 6 guest rooms, and boat rentals for up to 8 people [Les Toquées - Les Toquées Lille](https://lestoquees.com/), [Les Toquées - Les Toquées Lille](https://www.lestoquees.com).
*   **Management Lease:** Prior to its liquidation, TITOY RESTAURATION granted a management lease (location-gérance) for the restaurant and guest rooms to BLOEMPOT EURL (SIREN 797 648 698), represented by Chef Florent Ladeyn, for the period of January 22, 2025, to June 30, 2025 [Le Figaro](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/titoy-restauration-59/entreprise-841507221).

## Group Size and Locations
The establishment is an independent, single-site operation. 

*   **Total Locations: 1**
*   **Verification:** The official website does not feature a store locator, explicitly representing a single physical location at 110 Quai Géry Legrand, 59000 Lille [Les Toquées - Les Toquées Lille](https://www.lestoquees.com). No other affiliated locations, branches, or franchises are identified in the corporate registries for either SARL LES TOQUEES DE LA CUISINE or TITOY RESTAURATION. 

## Gaps and Limitations
*   **Holding Company Portfolio:** The corporate portfolio of JKUBBE HOLDING (appointed President of TITOY RESTAURATION in May 2025) is not provided in the findings. It is unknown if this holding company owns other CHR establishments outside of this specific site.
*   **Unclear Corporate Links:** Corporate registries note a "supposed nature" relationship between TITOY RESTAURATION and PONT CHATEAU DISTRIBUTION (SIREN 007 280 217) / ITM ALIMENTAIRE OUEST, but the exact nature of this relationship cannot be verified with the provided data.
*   **Current Operational Status:** While TITOY RESTAURATION was placed into judicial liquidation in February 2026, the findings do not specify if the cooking school entity (SARL LES TOQUEES DE LA CUISINE) is still actively operating at the premises.
